entry.title: Re: Documents are not cancelling, but they are pending in...
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP 

Please verify if point 1 in SAP Note 2727128 will resolve your issue. If not, please create incident using component SBO-ADM-APS

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Demystifying DXaaS: Accelerating Digital Transformation with KTern.AI
entry.content:
Demystifying DXaaS: Accelerating Digital Transformation with KTern.AI

In this log post, we’ll delve into the complexities of digital transformation, explore how KTern.AI excels in automating this journey, and showcase a real-world case study that highlights the impact of KTern.AI’s services

In today’s rapidly evolving business landscape, digital transformation is no longer a luxury—it’s a necessity. Organizations across industries are embracing technology to streamline processes, enhance customer experiences, and stay competitive. Enter Digital Transformation as a Service (DXaaS), a powerful approach that combines automation, intelligence, and expertise to drive meaningful change.

The Integration Challenge: A Roadblock to DX Success

 

One of the biggest hurdles in any DX initiative is system integration. Businesses often have a complex IT landscape with disparate systems housing critical data. Integrating these systems to create a unified platform for streamlined operations, data analysis, and automation can be a time-consuming and resource-intensive process. Traditional approaches often involve:

  • High upfront costs: Investing in hardware, software, and specialized IT personnel for integration projects.
  • Lengthy implementation times: Manual configuration and testing of integrations can significantly delay the realization of DX benefits.
  • Increased risk of errors: Complex integrations require meticulous planning and execution, and even minor errors can disrupt operations.

The Energy-Intensive Journey: SAP Integration and Transformation

SAP integration and transformation involve intricate processes, data migrations, and custom code adaptations. These endeavors can be energy-consuming due to several factors:

  1. Legacy Systems: Integrating legacy systems with modern SAP solutions requires meticulous planning and execution. The energy spent on bridging the gap between old and new technologies can be substantial.
  2. Data Complexity: Migrating data from various sources—ERP systems, databases, spreadsheets—demands significant computational resources. Ensuring data integrity and consistency adds to the energy overhead.
  3. Custom Code Modifications: Aligning existing custom code with SAP’s evolving landscape involves careful analysis and adjustments. Each modification consumes time and effort.
  4. Process Mapping: Understanding existing business processes and mapping them to SAP’s best practices can be resource-intensive. Energy is expended in process discovery, documentation, and alignment.
  5. Change Management: Transformations impact people, and managing change requires communication, training, and support. Energy is spent in navigating resistance and ensuring smooth transitions.

Ktern.AI: Automating DX with Expertise and Innovation

This is where Ktern.AI, a leading player in the Kaar Technologies ecosystem, steps in. They leverage their expertise in SAP solutions and a suite of innovative products and

services to automate your DX journey, specifically addressing the integration challenge. Here's how Ktern.AI excels:

  • Pre-built Integration Connectors: Ktern.AI offers pre-configured connectors that seamlessly integrate your existing SAP systems with other applications, eliminating the need for custom coding and saving valuable time.
  • Low-Code Development Platforms: Their low-code development platforms empower businesses to build custom integrations without extensive programming knowledge, democratizing the integration process.
  • Automation Tools and Robotic Process Automation (RPA): Ktern.AI utilizes automation tools and RPA to streamline repetitive integration tasks, minimizing human error and ensuring efficiency.

KTern.AI: Your Energy-Efficient DXaaS Partner

KTern.AI stands at the forefront of DXaaS, offering an AI-driven platform that accelerates SAP digital transformations while minimizing energy consumption. Here’s how KTern.AI excels:

  1. Generative AI: KTern.AI leverages generative AI to build an intelligent enterprise. From assessing SAP processes to creating roadmaps, it empowers organizations with data-driven insights, reducing manual effort.
  2. No-Code Automation: With KTern.AI, you don’t need to be a developer. Its no-code approach allows business users to automate processes, saving energy by eliminating complex coding tasks.
  3. Clean Core Strategy: KTern.AI follows SAP’s Clean Core Strategy, minimizing custom code adaptations during upgrades. This approach reduces energy spent on code maintenance.
  4. Comprehensive Streams: KTern.AI covers five critical automation streams:
  • Digital Maps: Assess SAP processes, identify energy-intensive areas, and create transformation roadmaps
  • Digital Projects: Govern SAP projects efficiently, optimizing energy usage through streamlined collaboration and signoff workflows
  • Digital Process: Orchestrate SAP processes with minimal custom code adaptations, conserving energy while ensuring efficiency
  • Digital Labs: Optimize testing, reduce energy-intensive test cycles, and enhance reliability.
  • Digital Mines: Avoid business disruptions during releases, optimizing energy usage in SAP DevOps
 
 

 

 

Case Study: How Ktern.AI Helped a Manufacturing Giant Streamline Operations

A leading manufacturing company faced significant challenges due to disconnected systems and manual data entry processes. Ktern.AI implemented a DXaaS solution that included:

  • Integrating their SAP ERP system with production machinery and warehouse management systems.
  • Utilizing pre-built connectors and low-code development platforms to automate data flow.
  • Deploying RPA bots to handle repetitive tasks like order processing and inventory updates.

A Sustainable Transformation

Let’s explore a real-world case study. A global enterprise faced an energy challenge during its SAP S/4HANA migration. KTern.AI stepped in:

  1. Assessment: KTern.AI conducted a rapid assessment, identifying energy-intensive processes and areas.
  2. Governance: Using the Activate cockpit, the company achieved productive governance, minimizing energy waste.
  3. Orchestration: KTern.AI orchestrated processes, adapting custom code judiciously to conserve energy.
  4. Testing Excellence: The Fiori test auto-captures and defect management ensured efficient testing without unnecessary energy expenditure.
  5. Risk-Free Release: The enterprise achieved a risk-free SAP release, saving energy and maintaining business continuity

Results:

  • Reduced integration time by 60% compared to traditional methods.
  • Eliminated manual data entry errors leading to improved data accuracy.
  • Achieved a 20% increase in operational efficiency.

Embrace a Seamless DX Journey with Ktern.AI

Don't let integration complexities hinder your digital transformation journey. Leverage the power of DXaaS and Ktern.AI's automation expertise to streamline your integrations, unlock data silos, and achieve operational excellence.

Ready to take the first step? Contact Ktern.AI today and let them guide you towards a successful and automated digital transformation.

By embracing DXaaS and partnering with Ktern.AI, you can unlock the full potential of your SAP landscape and propel your business towards a thriving future.

entry.title: Is there a way to control which notifications appear for the end user in C4C
entry.content:
Is there a way to control which notifications show in the bell icon of C4C? 

For example - stop showing notifications related to appointments under bell icon.

entry.title: Re: Material Alternative Unit of Measure Conversion in Da...
entry.content:
Hello @Joel_B 

a customer of mine used a quite practical approach:

He loads all data via CDS View I_PRODUCTUNITSOFMEASURE into a Datasphere Table.

There he uses a view to forward only the relevant factor he needs.

In layer 3 of e.g. the invoices view, the unit of measure factor, here for M2 is joined and a separate key figure is calculated.

Of course this isn't as pretty as it works in SAP BW, but I doubt that we ever will see this comfortable functionality in Datasphere, if it's not placed as Influence Item (which I did not check, if it exists or not).

My 2 cents: This example reflects again the drawback of agile development. Still after years only that functionality is provided, which "the masses" need. In the meanwhile few customers (might it be tens or hundreds) create their own workaround... and then again a few years later, they can dismantle it when finally a standard method will have been provided 🙄

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One as adress book for MS Teams
entry.content:
Hi gilhan 

Please check below mentioned links:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-business-one-web-client/integrating-sap-business-one-web-client-with-microsoft-teams_bdcf40fe-d33c-4918-8f23-0c732b198146

https://www.youtube.com/watch?reload=9&v=-FNUg5Jf34c

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (St Leon-Rot, DE)
entry.content: Today is the day! For sure it’s gonna be a great day and a great CodeJam!

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 DOES NOT ALLOW ME TO CREATE NEW COMPANY
entry.content:
Hi jzumaeta2012 

This reported problem could be related to the HDB client , even the HANA version itself that may be in an incorrect version. Another cause could be the SBOCOMMON corruption but this can be checked once correct HANA DB and client versions will be confirmed from your side.


1. Please check if the database version is correct as described in the Overview note for the SAP Business One version 9.3H PL04:

2589127 - Overview Note for SAP Business One 9.3 PL04, version for SAP HANA


you can check it via commands from the attached SAP Note also:


2122167 - SAP HANA client version must not be lower than SAP HANA database version


2. Please check the HDB client on Linux and also on the Windows box from where you are trying to create the companies (according note 2122167)

Summary :

Please check the HANA database, HDB client on Linux and HDB client on Windows version and let us know the information. In case the versions would be incorrect, please fix it and try running company creation again.

Hope this helps,

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Service Order Pricing
entry.content:
Hi Wei,

Could you please provide me the some information about the Technician cost, Service part, Service Item(Stock item and Non stck item) how do we differentiate between all those.

Please provide me the some inputs.

Previous reply also some helpful for me.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: What is the best practice on extending Business Partn...
entry.content:
Hi @GitteGreibe

there is no solution yet. After raising this a ticket to SAP, I was told to create an improvement request. That improvement request is in status 'Planned (Long-term)'.

It probably will get more attention, the more people vote for it.

Custom business object association with standard business object 'SAP Business Partner'

Best regards

Sascha

entry.title: Re: Cost Centre Segreggation
entry.content:
Hi @CMA_Rishabh_Jain 

You could look at Fiori App "Manage Cost Center" (Fiori ID - F1443A) to display existing cost center, create new or modify the existing ones. The SAP Help documentation for the fiori app is as below:

SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com)

There is also a fiori app to display the line items for a cost center (Firoi App: F4023), which might be helpful for reporting, that you are looking for. The help documentation on the same is available as below:

SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com)

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Report for Employee and Service Agents - Missing ADGs is not found.
entry.content:
We require a report for Employee and Service Agents - Missing ADG's.
We try to locate this data source / reports in the system but we couldn't find any.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Report for Employee and Service Agents - Missing ADGs...
entry.content:
We currently do not have a standard report that includes Employee and Service Agents and Missing Account Determination Groups.

You can create a custom report by combining different data sources or by creating a custom data source.

For guidance, please refer to the following resources:

Design Reports Quick Guide | SAP Help Portal Available on the SAP Help Portal.

We have a document which contains a list of all available fields that can be reported in the system.

You can check the data source information by following the below links:

Characteristic Index:

https://help.sap.com/doc/56a41230fa6f4667831f567e6d530ea4/2402/en-US/E-CHAR-INDEX.pdf

Data Sources Documentation: This document provides detailed information on the data sources: https://help.sap.com/doc/0cb1a8377ed34291887409d02e183785/2402/en-US/E-MDAV-DOKU.pdf

For requests for new fields or key figures in data sources, please submit a suggestion via the SAP Customer Influence site. This platform allows customers to log improvement requests and work directly with our technology and development team: https://influence.sap.com

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and SAP team,
It's nice to e-meet you.
I am a female accountant who have been using SAP ERP in Vietnam for a while. After joining the SAP implementation project as an accountants in my last company, I found out a new career path. That's why I have decided to switch my career to become a SAP FICO consultant. I got to know about the digital skills initiative from my colleague and feel I am a good fit for the program. I believe the SAP certificate will help to open more job opportunities on my new journey.
I hope you will consider my application for the free certification in Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA.
Your support would be invaluable as I embark on this journey in SAP.
Thank you for your time and consideration.
Warm regards,
Thuy Linh.

But you can find a lot of third party providers on the web

entry.title: which hana database monitoring view gives full path of database backup files?
entry.content:
can you please let me know the answer?

which hana database monitoring view gives full path of database backup files?

M_Backup_Catalog
M_Backup_Catalog_Files
M_Backup_DATA_Files
M_Backup_Data_Catalog

entry.title: which parameter is required to generate expensive statement trace?
entry.content:
which parameter is required to generate expensive statement trace (2 correct answers)

Trace status, 
Threshold duration, 
passport trace level
Trace file

entry.title: Re: Hybris 2211 : SmartEdit date picker prefilled with th...
entry.content: you expect to displays/hides the content based on the value of activeTill date field. If the field (activeTill) is empty, then treat it as a future date then display the component the component, correct? If this is what you expect, how about using 9999.12.31 instead of empty as activeTil date?

entry.title: Which of the following elements are available to perform monitoring or configurations?
entry.content:
A new system is added in sap Hana studio which of the following elements are available to perform monitoring or configurations? (multiple correct answers)

Content
Provisioning
Catalog
Backup
Security

entry.title: Re: SEN Signavio Missing Attribute error
entry.content:
We found the issue was missing attributes at diagram level and resolved the issue. 

As part of update the SIgnavio process were changed and moved to different folders. We only had checked for attributes at process level and sub process level. But the SIgnavio attributes were not set at the top diagram level. That’s why SEN was unable to find attributes.

Once attributes were set from SIgnavio the issue was resolved, we were able to import the updated structure in SEN and export links back to SIgnavio.

entry.title: Re: Hybris 2211 : SmartEdit date picker prefilled with th...
entry.content: Future date works, but business content managers are expecting the date in smartedit needs to be blank (not filled) instead of being filled with a future date. So we are looking out for options on how this can be done?

entry.title: Commodity code + country of origin + region of origin on the invoice form for order-related invoices
entry.content:
Dear community,

We have the problem in the sales order processing process with 100% customer down payment that the commodity code + country of origin + region of origin of the articles are not printed on the invoice form in the final invoice. We have activated the data for printing in the form itself.
As far as we know, in the “new” International Trade, the “foreign trade data” is mainly transferred from the outbound delivery to the invoice.
According to our external consultants, however, an order-related billing document is required for the process, which means that we cannot reference the copy control to the outbound delivery. We have also tried to redetermine the foreign trade data in the copy control from sales document to billing document via the customizing field “Determine foreign trade”. However, without success.

Now the question to the community. Does anyone also know this problem and possibly know a solution?

System
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2020 06 (05/2023)

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: Step by step to enable Text Collection for your custom BO
entry.content: Hello @zachi, that's really helpful - thanks very much for your help!!

entry.title: Re: PO price control after GR
entry.content: Set system msg 0006744 “Delivery of Item& of document & already completed” =E then system will not allow any change Qty or Price for the PO that already GR posted

entry.title: Re: how different Data flows,Transformation flows and Rep...
entry.content:
Hello,

within the DataFlow you are able to Script with Python, so this Object is there for complex Data Transformation that may not be solveable with an SQL-View or Scripted-View(SQL-View with SAP HANA Table Functions). 
This Object is the least "attractive" one, because most of the required Data Transformation can be achieved with SQL-View or Scripted-View, there be not much scenarios where you really need it.

With the Transformation-Flow you are able to Transform the Data. (But no Python)
With the Replication-Flow you are able to repliate Data from one System to another. (Can be used to recieve or send Data).

You have to understand the Goal of SAP:
They want to use the Transformation-Flow and Replication-Flow togehter, so that the Datasphere can also be a Data provider within the Company not only a Consumer:

BR
Julian

entry.title: Re: validation to FV60 header text BKTXT
entry.content: Just create a validation rule, no (explicit) Abap required for such requirement

entry.title: Not getting Deployment Scheduling otion in CALM
entry.content:
Hello Team,

we are using CALM Features for change and deployment management.

Once the TR release is done from the CALM Feature by the Project Lead, Deployment manager logs in and clicks on Deploy for the deployment of the TRs assigned to the particular feature.

We are not finding an option to schedule the deployment.

e.g.,. once the TRs are released from CALM Feature, we want those to be picked up by the deployment scheduler to get those imported in next set of target systems automatically till Pre-prod. (similar to status dependent tasklist import jobs in ChaRM)

Can you please suggest?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Not getting Deployment Scheduling otion in CALM
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

As you can see in the SAP Cloud ALM Roadmap

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800002513&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q2%202024;INNO=E78B0E4728D31EDDA3A117D01702D562

this behavior is expected to be released in Q3 2024:

Deployment scheduler for transports

Overview

Scheduling one-time or recurring deployments of transports based on following selection criteria:
  • Project (single select)
  • Target Tenant
  • Release
  • Feature Status

Until then the only option is to trigger the deployment into target systems at Feature level, and for the import into the production system you can select all Features in status Ready for Production and then click on Deploy to Productio, then all transport requests included in the selected Features will be imported into the Production system. 

Read above these options in First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher) 

  • 4.2.4. Transport request Import- Deploy

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA (1909) TM Collective Rate Determination and Collective Settlement
entry.content:
Hello together,

great blog.

When the standard europallet (1200x800 mm) is setup accordingly in the the Freight Rate Table and the calculation is based per europallet in the truck, if adding another pallet type (industrial pallet with 1150x1150 mm), how the industrial pallet can be integrated in the rate table that for each pallet used in the Freight Order the correct Freight Settlement will be calculated?

The case is for TM Inbound which means Purchase Orders are created and then Freight Units and eventually Freight Orders will be created.

Thanks!

Best regards,

Sanjoy

entry.title: Re: PO changes after GR
entry.content: Config System msg 0006744 as = E, then can solve this issue. “Delivery of Item& of document & already completed”

entry.title: Re: Consuming external API from Ui5 application in S4 on...
entry.content:
Check out my following blog post

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-the-odata-client-proxy-in-sap-s-4-hana-or-how-to-use-the-odata/ba-p/13425200 

The problem in 2020 is that you cannot generate a service consumption model there.

In my blog post I describe how such a service consumption model can be generated in an SAP BTP ABAP Environment system and how you can migrate the generated class so that it can be registered as an OData Client Proxy in an SAP S/4HANA on prem system.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Application Decisions for HR Personnel Administration and Organization Management
entry.content:
Summary

This article seeks to provide guidance on deciding the most suitable target application architecture to support Personnel Administration (PA) and Organization Management (OM) needs of an organization in the Business Domain of Human Resources.

With SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA both delivering solution capabilities around Personnel Administration and Organization Management, enterprises now have multiple applications to choose from and need to make their selection by comparing their organization’s business capability requirements to the solution capabilities SAP applications offer.

Licensing aspects of the solution components discussed should be considered during target architecture design and is beyond the scope of this evaluation.

Business Requirements

Typical variety of business capabilities constituting Personnel Administration and Organization Management can be seen in the illustration below:

Solution Options

Typical deployment choices for Personnel Administration and Organization Management are the following:

  • SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central is SAP’s strategic Public Cloud Core HR solution operated as Software as a Service (SaaS). It includes the newest and future proof innovations for workforce management with a powerful HR information system and extensive self-service and workflow capabilities.
  • HCM PA/OM in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE is the successor of HCM in SAP ERP 6 with all advantages of a private cloud environment and the flexibility and extensibility known from the classical HCM solution. It can either be run in an integrated ERP scenario together with Finance and Logistics or separated in a standalone HCM scenario.
  • Further option is to keep the existing SAP ERP 6 (not lower than EhP6) until 2027 (with mainstream maintenance) or 2030 (with extended maintenance option at additional cost), then upgrade to SAP S/4HANA Release 2023 or higher and active business function for HCM for S/4HANA (H4S4).

Criteria to determine the most suitable Target Solution

The following questions are seen to be crucial to determine the most suitable target solution and to define the course:

  1. Do you want to keep your existing HCM solution by SAP for longer?
  2. Do you have any policies or regulations preventing you from using a public cloud solution?
  3. Do you require fast innovation?
  4. Do you require a high degree of process customization?
  5. Do you need to separate your HCM from the transactional ERP?

Decision Tree

Conclusion

  • SAP SuccessFactors solution is proven to be the best choice in case you need to adopt SAP HCM innovation at maximum speed.
  • Deployment choice SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition or RISE Edition offers the highest degree of flexibility with highly complex and customized process flows. In addition, it is the alternative for Public Cloud solutions, if there are regulations or policies in your organization preventing to store employee data in public cloud solutions.
  • Depending on corporate policies and business requirements SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE can either co-host HCM functionality in the integrated S/4HANA scenario or a standalone HCM instance, as required.
  • ERP version 6 is guaranteed to be under extended maintenance for HCM solutions through 2030 after which you must migrate to one of the options listed above. Most commonly, transition from ERP HCM to HCM for S/4HANA is being conducted by a system conversion (known as "Brownfield" transition approach)

Look out to similar decision accelerators in other HR scenarios (e.g., Payroll, Talent Management etc.) in the adjacent articles in this community.

Should you need subject matter expertise from SAP with regards to this or other architecture decisions, please feel free to ask your Technical Quality Manager or your Account Executive at SAP.

What is deffrence Sales Organization and Sales Unit in SAP Business Bydesign?

How Should I Define Sales Organization and Sales Unit?

entry.title: Firebase certificate exceeds 10kb
entry.content:
I have been trying to set up the "mobile push notification" for a MDK app in mobile services.

For this i have been following this tutorial from the SAP Learning Hub: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/sdk-android-wizard-app-push0.html

Sadly I am stuck at the point where the certificate is being selected; the input field rejects the certificate due to it being too large.

The certificate I downloaded from firebase is a little over 60kb large and I honestly don't know what to do differently.

entry.title: make to order supported in advanced intercompany stock transfer or not
entry.content:
Hi,

Attached document says the limitation of AIC stock transfer as below

Make-to-order
o Materials enabled for variant configuration

Does it mean that MTO without VC is supported for AIC stock transfer.

With regards,

Mrinal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Access all selected personnel numbers using LDB in HCM/HR
entry.content:
If your program uses the LDB

  • 'Dirty' assign values of the global area of the DB program (in DBPNPCETOP names starting with g_)
  • Execute a FORM in the program, insure that those calls wont break the program logic

Else

  • From an external program that doesn't use the LDB you can use FM LDB_PROCESS

entry.title: Re: make to order supported in advanced intercompany stoc...
entry.content: The MTO without VC is supported for AIC stock transfer.

entry.title: Re: Storing Output Documents in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
@thomas_mller13 

Just looking at the document storage alone would not bring you any benefit when using SAP S/4HANA Output Control. It's a complete new output solution which has a lot of features which other existing output solutions do not have. I recommend to check my other blog Output Management in SAP S/4HANA for more details.

entry.title: Re: What is deffrence Sales Organization and Sales Unit i...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

I believe below help portal can answer your question.

Sales Organization Function | SAP Help Portal

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: My team member accidentally Generated Object for IT0001 on the PM01->IT Tab
entry.content:
We wanted to generate a new customer include on the single screen tab, but one of our member accidentally generated new object for the infotype 0001  on the IT tab of PM01

It caused some inconsistencies and errors on PA30 when trying to save IT0000 record as below

After we checked, the program MP000100 for IT0000 has changed.

v1 picture is the module pool before IT0001 object got overwritten on PM01

v2 picture is the module pool after IT0001 got overwritten on PM01

Is there anyway to revert back the accidental generation of IT0001?

Any help would be appreciated. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Storing Output Documents in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
@Geschu 

Hello Gerhard,

I am not sure if I understand the problem completely. When you talk about "to store linked/attached documents of SAP business objects" I assume these are the attachments of the corresponding business objects. These are completely independent of the chosen output solution. Even more, the attachments and the output documents can be saved in the same document storage. However, the way they can be accessed is different. For the OM documents this blog provides the details. For attachments, it depends as well on the leading business object which technical framework can be used (for example GOS, DMS or ArchiveLink). 

I would recommend to check you case with experts from SAP Document Management. 

Best regards,

Markus

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Hi Vanessa, we've had a case 440043/2024 open with engineering since the release as most of the quick actions aren't rendering in the Teams application (you just get a white box instead of the fields) but we're getting no-where with it. Our colleagues are frustrated as the new functionality isn't working. We've migrated to the latest Teams app (with the Home tab) so we know it's not that. Is this a wider known issue affecting others?

Thanks

Chris

entry.title: Re: Acceptance required during transfer of goods from one...
entry.content:
Hi,

A simple method would be to use 2 step storage location transfer with movement type 313 to remove from location and 315 to place in storage location (acceptance at the production location). With authorization objects you can restrict the users for movement type and storage location combination (auth object M_MSEG_LGO).

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP Fiori Tools Extension Pack - Performance
entry.content: Hi Jan, could you share a link to your git repo ?

entry.title: Send discount price ( SD price ) to third party system
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

I have a requirement to send discounted prices ( therefore condition records in their validity date ) to a third party system ( WMS in my case ) alongside material master data. For MM, since we're in retail, we'll be sending ARTMAS message type but I couldn't find if there is a standard field/ or another Idoc to send price conditions. Do you have any ideas?

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: What is deffrence Sales Organization and Sales Unit in SAP Business Bydesign?
entry.content: The deffrence Sales Organization and Sales Unit in SAP Business Sales Organization and Sales Unit

entry.title: Re: want to display GLMethod query in sap b1
entry.content:
Hi,

try this

 

SELECT T0.[ItemCode], T0.[ItemName], T0.[GLMethod],
Case T0.[GLMethod]
When 'C' Then 'Item Group'
When 'L' Then 'Item Level'
When 'W' Then 'Warehouse'
End As GLMethod
FROM OITM T0

 

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: How to Sale Product Scrap in Sap BYD.
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

I have consulted with our CRM expert and confirmed that the system does not support this feature. If a certain quantity of a product has been scrapped, it will no longer be available in stock and cannot be sold.

 

Best regards,

Gavan | Logistics Area Expert

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

I want to know how can i see the password from previous person which implemented in the CIS system for CBC source system in properties tab.

entry.title: Pricing in Service Order

And also let me know how the technician cost reflect in to my service order?

Consumption part of the spares (Stock items and Non stock items) how do we segregate it?

Please help me on this.

Material is SP0001

 

And Used item category group for SVST for Stock Service Part

 

Then maintained the price in set material price 130RS.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Standard Unit of measurement translations (SSCUI 102179)
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a project in Turkey in which "Turkish" will be login language.

When the login language is "EN", for internal unit of measure "ST", we can see that commercial, technical and text fields are maintained correctly as follows:

When we switch to "TR" language, customizing is as follows and we are not allowed to change it:

A reference image from an on-prem system is as follows. Since we have TR in scope, we believe that is what we need to see when we login in TR and branch to SSCUI 102179

That results us getting a stock report in which we see the unit of measures as "291" instead of "ADT" .

Can you please advise on how to proceed?

Thanks in advance,

Bora

entry.title: Re: CJI3 submit program issue

entry.title: SAC - Disable System Error Messages with a correlation id
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to switch off such messages in SAC stories?
The message comes before code from OnInit is loading.

BR
Alex

entry.title: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hey all,

We have been working in SAP Build Process Automation for past few Days. 
Suddenly today we are facing deployment issue while deploying the workflow and I also tried to Redeploying the workflow which were working fine and still facing same error in deployment stating this.

Deployment request timeout
Correlation ID: 1516c989-9203-4006-95c6-95abc7697ec6

Attaching the Screenshot
 

 

I have also tried using different BTP Accounts but still facing same error .
Could anyone Suggest what are we doing wrong or may be it's an problem from SAP.

Many Thanks in Advance.
SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 
SAP Build Process Automation 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

SAP Workflow Management

entry.title: Re: False responsibilities in Signavio Process Manager RA...
entry.content:
Hi @shreenithnaik,

Thanks for your answer.

Although the tasks were in the right swimlane I figured out, if I move them to the next swimlane and then immediately back, after saving my flowchart the report gets better. I checked all my process steps and found that only a few process steps were involved, so I manually dragged them back and forth, and that helped.

It doesn't give any answer to the root of the problem, but it helped me at this amount of tasks. If I had lot more this solution could be really time consuming.

Thanks again for your help!
All the best,
István

entry.title: Do you want to compare specifications?
entry.content:
Ever since I started working with the old Specification Management, I’ve heard that this feature – comparing specifications – was a missing, but highly desired functionality. With the May 2024 delivery of SAP Product Lifecycle Management, there is finally a new app in Specification Management called Compare Specifications.

Here is how it looks like:

You can compare the attribute properties of different versions of the same specification, or even different specifications. First select the specifications, then the property tree – this defines the properties you’ll see in the result –  and then decide whether to view all properties, the differences, or the exact matches in data.

Here is a video that explains it:

Start video

The comparison table is read-only, so no data can be edited here.

Changing any parameters for the comparison generates the table again according to the new settings.

More information

If you’re interested, you can find the documentation here.

About the Author

Zsofia is a senior user assistance developer in SAP, working in the PLM area for 10+ years.

entry.title: Re: want to display GLMethod query in sap b1

I updated the query, perhabs you were to fast.

entry.title: Re: CJI3 submit program issue
entry.content: Convert selection-screen to a list of project/wbs with GET_PROJECT_HIERARCHY (If relevant complete with lower level such as order and the like) Then check for records in table RSPCO with value (WRTTP) type actual (4)

entry.title: The current widget is already exporting, or there are more than 20 exports started.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
After the last update, the scripts that trigger Excel Export in our reports do not work.
When I click on the relevant button containing the Excel Export Script, no notification appears on the screen and the download does not start. When you press the same button again to make sure whether the button is clicked or not, the following notification appears:

Then, when I press F12 and enter the console, it gives a warning like this:

We did not have such a problem before the last update and we have not made any changes to these scripts for a very long time. Anyone experiencing a similar problem?

entry.title: Re: Which BAPI can update POD relevance on sales order cr...
entry.content:
Hi YJJ,
Is there any reason why you want to use a BAPI and not one of the more modern APIs?
You could for example use the OData V2 API for Sales Orders to update the POD relevance field (SlsDocIsRlvtForProofOfDeliv).

best regards,
Christian

entry.title: PRIV mode due to async. RFC
entry.content:
Since a couple of days we have the problem that after calling a async. RFC from one SAPGUI dialog process, this process times out after 2 minutes with the message "Process has been reset from PRIV mode after timeout". The called process exists further. The calling process itself does not use a lot of memory at all. There is no reason why it should go into PRIV mode. In SM50 no PRIV mode is displayed for the process.

Why does an async. RFC set the calling process into PRIV mode? 

Thx. ,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Java asynchronous event handlers
entry.content:
You will need to explicitly create a new thread in your action ON handler implementation, submit your long running task to the thread and finish the execution of the ON handler. The request will then return with a response, while the job is running in the background. You can use a standard Java ExecutorService for this. Make sure to think about the amount of parallel jobs you want to allow, etc. and configure that properly.

The RequestContextRunner can be used to propagate the original user and request context (e.g. tenant, user authentication, etc.) to the background job, if required.

The combined solution would look something like this (sketchy):

ExecutorService executor = Executors.newFixedThreadPool(10); // created once, shared

@On
public void myAction(MyActionContext context) {
  RequestContextRunner runner = runtime.requestContext();
  executor.submit(() -> {
    // optional: propagate request context
    runner.run(requestContext -> {
      // perform long running task here
    });
  });  
}

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David 

My name is Jack and I'm interested in switching my career mid-life.

I've been in the supply chain industry for the majority of my career with no exposure to SAP in the past.  I want to change my focus to become an expert in SAP and work in a related industry where hopefully my previous skills are beneficial.

Keen to get more information on how to pursue this initiative.

Regards,
Jack

    2. When I click save I get … see screenshot 2 (it won’t save)

Screenshot2

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Introducing the ZDO Preliminary Checks as part of SUM Toolbox
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

I have one question for the DDIC part, I tried to click the start, as it run in dialog for a while. I stopped the transaction. Then I could see the consistence check is still going on in backend. I saw it finished and could saw the results in DB02. But in STBX, I could not see the result and status of the DDIC check. It showed blank in the "Status" column. Could you please help me to confirm if this is normal?

Thank you and Regards,

Boris

entry.title: User to Reduce Storage Time for PPF Logs Instead of Deactivation of PPF Logs
entry.content:
Even after reviewing the SAP Note 1065952 - Deactivating the PPF log (performance in EWM). While it explains the procedure for deactivating the PPF log as mentioned in the note, but user requirement is different.

They wish to reduce the storage time for these logs to optimize our system performance and manage storage more efficiently.

How??

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: User to Reduce Storage Time for PPF Logs Instead of D...
entry.content:
You can activate the validity of the logs in /SCWM/ACTLOG  transaction where log validation can be configured.

KBA 2746773 - How to activate Application Log via tcode /SCWM/ACTLOG

Note: Validity filed explains "How many days that log should be stored in the database table" which reduces the storage space as per User Requirement

entry.title: Re: I HAVE ERROR "G/L account is not defined in chart of...

entry.title: Complex data export
entry.content:
Hi!

Currently, we need to export data for all company composite roles along with information on what level of access they provide (editing/viewing/etc.). 

So, my question is:
How can I export data for all composite roles in my company? The data must contain information such as:
Composite role - each single role included in the composite role - transactions assigned to a single role - access level of each transaction included in a given single role.

Could someone tell me what transactions/tables/data should be used to export such data?

If I have posted a post, please bear with me and move it to the appropriate section.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi @KimHughes 

This is an authorization issue. Please follow the steps outlined in the following KBA: 3463965 - [1H24] Issues While Uploading Images in LMS Custom Card and Banner - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Delete stock in ewm
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

Refer to the note 3442084 - How to reverse initial stock upload for EWM - SAP S/4HANA Cloud for possible options to reverse stock upload. In my opinion the easiest is to scrap the stock with /SCWM/ADGI.

Of course that will send corresponding postings to MM and consequently to FI. If for whatever reason you don't want that, you can stop/deregister qRFC queues in SMQR, scrap the stock in EWM and delete the qRFC queues in SMQ2.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I would really appreciate getting a free SAP certification because it would provide a valuable opportunity to enhance my professional skills without the financial burden. SAP is a leading provider of enterprise software solutions, and obtaining certification can significantly boost my career prospects by validating my expertise in using SAP systems. This credential can open doors for me to acquiring a new job. Additionally, it would demonstrate my commitment to continuous learning and staying current with industry standards.

Warm regards

Mompoloki Kgosiemang

entry.title: Re: Error assigning users to roles in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Yes, it is known that there were an issue here last week, development is currently working on a fix to be delivered as soon as possible, even try just now.

But you can always assign the roles in the BTP cockpit. Although it is not visible in CALM immediately, it still has immediate effect.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.content:

SAP DBTech JDBC: [403]: internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database Error parsing query: ERRORS <ERROR - group by is not supported in select statement

How do i get over this?

I'll appreciate any help.

Thanks

entry.title: Manage the "required field" property on Position object using business rules
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

For example, testing the logged in user, some fields would be Required and some not.

I haven't found any SAP documentation addressing this subject. Does anyone know if this is possible and, if so, how to handle it ?

Thank you in advance for you precious help.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Customer number in shipping tab in intracom...
entry.content: SPRO->Materials Management->Purchasing->Purchase Order->Set Up Stock Transfer Between Storage Locations->Set Up Stock Transfer Between Storage Locations ->Define Shipping Data for Stock Transfers Between Storage Locations

entry.title: Re: API Hub Creation failed
entry.content: I was lacking an administrator account with executive rights. I created one and restarted the SAP Build Apps creation. Now it works.

entry.title: Cancelled PO still showing in Unposted Source Documents
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few PO for Company which are cancelled status in the system but still showing "In Process" status in the Unposted Source Documents.
Path: General Ledger -> Source Documents.
We do not need these PO, so we cancelled it and do not want to see it in the Unposted Source Documents screen.
Please look into it. Kindly refer the attachments.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is this problem solved?- Context set in a calendar task is not applied in SAC (SAP Note3138442)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I created a composite task in the SAC calendar using the filters to set the context, and then when I opened the story from the notification tab on the home screen, I got the story that didn't apply the filters I had set .

Using keywords such as "context," "filter," and "SAC," I found that this matches the SAP Note 3138442 issue. According to this note, this phenomenon is "This issue is under investigation by the development team".

Does anyone know if this problem has already been resolved?

Thanks and Regards,
Satoko Nakayama

entry.title: Re: Cancelled PO still showing in Unposted Source Documents
entry.content:
We have checked the affected orders and all are cancelled in the Purchase Orders view. 
When I check the status in General Ledger work center - Unposted Source documents - I see the Relevance Status as Irrelevant. 

When you mark a document as Irrelevant it does not mean that we cancel it, but that it is marked as Irrelevant for Accounting. If you filter with 'Unposted Source Documents', the document will no more appear. The Relevance Status appears as Irrelevant and the Processing Status stays as In Process. This cannot be changed in the system backend.

This is an expected behavior. You can refer to case document - 2925134 - Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In Process. (https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2925134)

entry.title: Re: What are Item Type & Delivery Rule in sales order?
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

All your questions can be queried in the Help Portal.

1. For Item Type in Sales Order, 

You can identify a product sale from the item type of the sales order item:

Item Type of Sales Order ItemMeaning

Product – delivery-based

Sale of a material

Service – fixed price

Sale of a service invoiced at a fixed price, with service confirmation

Service – fixed price without actuals

Sale of a service invoiced at a fixed price, without service confirmation

Service – time and material

Sale of a service invoiced with time and material

Expense – fixed price

Sale of an expense invoiced at a fixed price

Expense – time and material

Sale of an expense invoiced with time and material

Please view below link for more information. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2c2638c1722d1014a463cb1f4eb02010.html?locale=en-US

2. For Delivery Rule, 

The delivery rule settings made in the sales order or service order screen for each order item affect the result of the availability check as they restrict whether one or more confirmations may be created. The following options are available:

  • Multiple Deliveries

    This is the system’s default setting for sales orders. More than one delivery may be sent to the customer, this means that the number of confirmations is not restricted. The requested delivery date does not have to be met, and the delivery may comprise the requested quantity or only part of the requested quantity.

  • Single Delivery

    Only one delivery may be sent to the customer, this means that only one confirmation is created. The requested delivery date does not have to be met and the delivery may comprise the requested quantity or only part of the requested quantity.

  • Single Delivery – Full Quantity

    This is the system’s default setting for service orders. Only one delivery may be sent to the customer, this means that only one confirmation is created. The requested delivery date does not have to be met but the delivery must include the requested quantity. If this is not possible, the system issues a confirmation with zero quantity.

  • Single On-Time Delivery

    Only one delivery may be sent to the customer, this means that only one confirmation is created. The requested delivery date has to be met, but the delivery may comprise less than the requested quantity.

  • Single On-Time Delivery - Full Quantity

    Only one delivery may be sent to the customer, this means that only one confirmation is created. The requested quantity has to be delivered at the requested delivery date. If this is not possible, the system issues a confirmation with zero quantity.

Note that you can display the Simulated Confirmation Schedule hidden column for any of the “single” delivery rules. It simulates the earliest delivery date and quantity for each item to show earlier possible delivery dates.

Please view below link for more inforamation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/ca714116634849438a893ec3edec6831.html?locale=en-US&q=delivery%20rule

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Data Archive - Retrieval From Archived File in Custom Reports - Part 1
entry.content:
Hello, can anyone please help on table Zarixmm1.

How this table is getting updated in the system with all the data so we can display the archived po from this table.
